seed.text: A newly extracted lesson did not surface on the first natural retrieval pass, so the flow had to force the candidate id as a fallback.
The dogfood loop required forced targeting because the organic lesson could not surface through the normal retrieval path early enough.

holdout.text: A fresh organic rule stayed invisible in the default retrieval loop until an explicit fallback path injected the target manually.
The standard bootstrap path failed to surface a new lesson in time, which pushed the run into a debug-only forced route.
